$comment: Discovery manifest for Old Family Recipe's MCP server. Mirrors what's published to npm as @oldfamilyrecipe/mcp-server. The MCP discovery spec is still evolving (see https://modelcontextprotocol.io); this file is a sensible JSON manifest intended to be human- and machine-readable for AI tool catalogs, registries, and crawlers. Update this file in lockstep with package.json + tool registrations in mcp-server/src/index.ts.
name: oldfamilyrecipe
description: MCP server for Old Family Recipe — let any AI assistant save, search, OCR-import, and meal-plan family recipes (with provenance) against a real production cookbook.

auth.freeTier: 250 Sage AI messages/month + unlimited recipe storage, no credit card

tools.name: recipe_create
tools.description: Create a recipe with ingredients, instructions, source person, story, origin year.

tools.name: recipe_import_image
tools.description: OCR a photo of a handwritten card into a structured recipe (server-side Vision).

tools.name: recipe_search
tools.description: Search by keyword, ingredient, or tag.

tools.name: sage_chat
tools.description: Chat with Sage, your AI cooking companion who knows your family's recipes.

tools.name: sage_meal_plan
tools.description: Have Sage plan your week from your cookbook plus new ideas.

tools.name: meal_plan_get
tools.description: Get the meal plan for a given week.

tools.name: meal_plan_update
tools.description: Set meals for specific days and slots.

tools.name: image_upload
tools.description: Get a presigned URL to upload a recipe photo or card scan.

tools.name: family_invite
tools.description: Invite a family member with optional relationship (sister, spouse, cousin, etc.).

tools.name: family_tree
tools.description: Read the invite graph for your family with each member's relationshipToInviter.
